//autogenerated by RSCG_Templating from file {{fileName}}
{{
func folderNameForClass(className)
	if className == "BootStrapIcons"
		ret "Bootstrap"
	end
	if className == "LucideIcons"
		ret "Lucide"
	end
	if className == "TailwindlabsHeroicons"
		ret "TailwindlabsHeroicons"
	end
	if className == "GlinckerTheSvgIcons"
		ret "glinckerthesvg"
	end
	if className == "Azure_Public_Service_Icons"
		ret "Azure_Public_Service_Icons"
	end
	if className == "Dynamics_365_App_Icons"
		ret "Dynamics_365_App_Icons"
	end
	if className == "Microsoft_365_content_icons"
		ret "Microsoft_365_content_icons"
	end
	if className == "IconNoir"
		ret "IconNoir"
	end
	if className == "Leungwensen"
		ret "Leungwensen"
	end
	if className == "SustyIcons"
		ret "SustyIcons"
	end
	if className == "AndflettCascade"
		ret "AndflettCascade"
	end
	if className == "artcoholic_akar_icons"
		ret "artcoholic_akar_icons"
	end
	if className == "ant_design_icons"
		ret "ant_design_icons"
	end
	if className == "cyberalien_line_md"
		ret "cyberalien_line_md"
	end
	if className == "BitcoinDesign_Bitcoin_Icons"
		ret "BitcoinDesign_Bitcoin_Icons"
	end
	if className == "box_icons_boxicons_core"
		ret "box_icons_boxicons_core"
	end
	if className == "danklammer_bytesize_icons"
		ret "danklammer_bytesize_icons"
	end
	if className == "catppuccin_vscode_icons"
		ret "catppuccin_vscode_icons"
	end
	if className == "jaynewey_charm_icons"
		ret "jaynewey_charm_icons"
	end
	if className == "HatScripts_circle_flags"
		ret "HatScripts_circle_flags"
	end
	if className == "vmware_archive_clarity_assets"
		ret "vmware_archive_clarity_assets"
	end
	if className == "codex_teamicons"
		ret "codex_teamicons"
	end
	if className == "devicons_devicon"
		ret "devicons_devicon"
	end
	if className == "fernandcf_duo_icons"
		ret "fernandcf_duo_icons"
	end
	if className == "SUSE_UIUX_eos_icons"
		ret "SUSE_UIUX_eos_icons"
	end
	ret className
end

func containsFolder(sv, folderName)
	lastIndex = sv.pathArr.size - 1
	ret sv.pathArr[lastIndex - 1] == folderName
end
}}
{{ if data.className == "IconLookupShared" }}
//nothing to do here	
{{ else }}
{{ 
folderName = folderNameForClass data.className
func containsCurrentFolder(sv)
	ret containsFolder sv folderName
end
filterForFolder = pathFiles | array.filter @containsCurrentFolder
}}
// {{filterForFolder[0].pathArr}}
//Number icons {{folderName}} {{filterForFolder.size }} 
namespace {{data.nameSpace}} {

	partial class {{data.className}} {
		
		public static string NameLibrary = "{{folderName}}";
		public static string[] IconNames = new []{
		{{ for file in filterForFolder }}
		"{{file.nameNoExt}}",
		{{end}}
		};

		public static Dictionary<string,string[]> IconAliases = new Dictionary<string,string[]> {
		{{ for file in filterForFolder }}
		{"{{file.nameNoExt}}", new []{
			"{{file.nameNoExt}}",
			"{{file.nameNoExt}}".NormalizeMe(),
			"{{file.namePascal}}",
			"{{file.namePascal}}".NormalizeMe()
		}},
		{{end}}
		};

		public static global::System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary<string, string> FromNameFile = new()
		{
		{{ for file in filterForFolder }}
			{"{{file.nameNoExt}}", "{{file.namePascal}}"},
		{{end}}
		};

		public static string? FromNameFileLookup(string name)
		{
			if (FromNameFile.TryGetValue(name, out var result))
				return result;
			return null;
		}

		public static readonly Lazy<global::System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary<string, global::SvgIconGenerator.IconDto?>> IconsByName = new(CreateIconsByName);

		private static global::System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary<string, global::SvgIconGenerator.IconDto?> CreateIconsByName()
		{
		//System.Diagnostics.Debugger.Break();
		//global::SvgIconGenerator.IconDto? x;
			var icons = new global::System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary<string, global::SvgIconGenerator.IconDto?>(
				global::System.StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase);
		{{ for file in filterForFolder }}
		// {{ 
		result = file.namePascal
		}}
		//x= {{data.className}}.{{result}};
			icons["{{result}}"] = {{result}};
			icons["{{file.nameNoExt}}"] = {{result}};
		{{ end }}
			return icons;
		}

		public static IEnumerable<string>  MaybeIs(string name) => IconLookupShared.MaybeIs(name, IconAliases);

		public static global::SvgIconGenerator.IconDto? FromName(string name) => IconLookupShared.FromName(name, IconsByName.Value);
	}
}
{{ end }}
